template_data.lead_html: Active Schedule. Two years. Zero awards. The price was the problem.

rows.what_html: Full audit: Schedule active 2 years — no RFQ responses, no awards
Found it: Basis of Award misaligned — rates 20–30% above comparable primes
Mod filed, pricing corrected — first award landed 90 days later

template_data.closer: THE SCHEDULE WAS FINE. THE PRICE WASN'T.
template_data.image_headline: THE SCHEDULE WAS FINE. THE PRICE WASN'T.
template_data.image_prompt: Infographic story layout. Left side: illustrated timeline with 3 milestone markers labeled 'AUDIT', 'FOUND IT', 'FIRST WIN' connected by a vertical path. Right side: illustrated professional woman in blazer reviewing a pricing document on a laptop, expression shifting from worried to confident. Dark navy header band with bold white headline: 'THE SCHEDULE WAS FINE. THE PRICE WASN'T.' Small callout box mid-card: 'BASIS OF AWARD'. Footer text: 'Josh Ladick · GSA Focus'.
